reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of optimization and evaluation, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links evaluator stability, conservatism, polished narratives, and suppression of breakthrough-generating weirdness.
falsifiable_why: Testable via whether stronger present-judgment optimization reduces later-recognized novelty despite apparent metric improvement.
explanation: Stable self-evaluation can become conservative, rewarding polished legibility while filtering out weirdness that enables real discovery.
